Class MechanicsBackendManager

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.core.technical.backend.AbstractBackendManager<MechanicsBackend>
org.jscience.natural.physics.classical.mechanics.MechanicsBackendManager
public class MechanicsBackendManager extends AbstractBackendManager<MechanicsBackend>
Manager for rigid body mechanic backends.
Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
